# kemp_replace_body_rule (Data Source)

Reads a system-level replace-body rule by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_replace_body_rule" "existing" {
  name = "sanitize-response"
}

output "pattern" {
  value = data.kemp_replace_body_rule.existing.pattern
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Rule name.

### Read-Only

- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
- `pattern` (String) Pattern matched in the response body.
- `replacement` (String) Replacement string.
